rationale: The citing article is a conceptual synthesis of regulatory fit and explicitly builds around mechanisms like “feeling right,” boundary conditions, and the fit-versus-relevance distinction, which are central claims of the cited paper. The cited paper provides both a review and a new experiment on value-from-fit (including willingness-to-pay effects), making it a plausible theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental mention. Given this strong topical and conceptual alignment, this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
